# Shipment Module

Module ID: shipment
Status: draft
Purpose: Shipment batches and fulfillment workflow with idempotent completion and shipment events.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Owned tables: shipment_batches, shipment_items, shipment_status_transitions, domain_events
Primary use cases: createShipment, getShipment, listShipments, startShipmentProcessing, completeShipment, cancelShipment, listShipmentStatusTransitions
Invariants: external references are unique per tenant/source, draft shipments can move to processing, processing replay is idempotent, completion references are unique per tenant, completed shipments replay safely, completed shipments cannot be cancelled or processed, cancelled shipments cannot be completed or processed.
